slide_text: Congrats! You foiled Mr. McMoneyPants's evil plan and saved the day!
After you destroyed that abomination in the lab, the fire department arrived and rescued everyone.
Your parents are relieved that you weren't hurt.
According to Willow, the underworld tree was the source of the magical disturbance and now that it has been destroyed, the neighborhood is safe!
For more good news, your Swapdeck survived the fight intact and you can now spend the rest of the summer playing Space Raiders on it with your buddy Carlos!

The Swapdeck 2.0 is an awesome console,
it really does live up to the hype.
Now that the magical disturbance is gone, Willow finally has some time to relax and enjoy her summer.
Willow will return to school in a few months, but for now, she's catching up with her sister, IT Girl.
IT Girl quit her job at Store Corp. and has gotten enough seed money for her own tech startup. Hopefully it works out for her.
As for Mr. McMoneyPants, he was arrested after the incident and was convicted of 34 felonies.

However, he was able to appeal the decision
and stay out of prison for now.

McMoneyPants is still planning on running for president and is leading in all of the polls.
Hopefully if he doesn't win and get revenge on you...
Cashier Guy and Martin decided that after the traumatic events they experienced, they both needed a mental health break.
They're planning on spending the rest of the summer on vacation in Aldoria. I hear the fungal rainforests there are stunning around this time of year.
Before they left though, Cashier Guy actually got the pay raise he wanted!
Since the previous Manager was... exploded, Cashier Guy is now the new manager of the local branch of Store Corp!
His first act as manager was to give himself unlimited sick and vacation days and also order a repair for the collapsed floor.
He still isn't paid enough to care though.
So yeah, that's it. Turns out with enough hard work, grit, and weedkiller, you can get what you want.
You're now famous in town for being the 'lawn mower kid' that saved the neighborhood from magical destruction. Everybody now wants your lawn care services.
I guess that truly makes you a legend of the lawns.
The End, thanks for playing!

By the way, you can still play the game in endless mode after the credits if you still want to mow lawns.
Or maybe you should go outside and touch some real grass.
